title: APM: Octo Demo Payment Redirect Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of suspicious payment redirect signals correlated to an Octo attack trace.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and 'Payment Redirect URL' != null | stats count as PaymentRedirectEvents by 'Attack ID', 'Trace ID', 'Payment Redirect URL'
